flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at McNeese State University rose 12% between 2017 and 2020 ($20.6k → $23.0k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at McNeese State University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.3% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at McNeese State University fell 39% between 2021 and 2024 ($16.4k → $10.0k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at McNeese State University rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 (22.6% → 25.4%).
